tool_args.label: Spring Trackwork Programs Staff Summary

payload.title: SPRING TRACKWORK PROGRAMS
payload.description: Staff Summary to inform the Long Island Committee of the MTA Long Island Rail Road's plan to temporarily adjust schedules in support of five trackwork programs.

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

tool_args.label: MTA Long Island Rail Road
Long Island Committee
LIRR Engineering forces

warnings: entity.organization is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Organization names should link to entity records when supported. Suggested relation: part_of_agency.

tool_args.label: NICE (Nassau Inter-County Express)
MTA Capital Program
Far Rockaway Branch – Switch Maintenance

payload.description: On Saturday, April 4th, both main tracks between Valley Stream and Far Rockaway will be taken out of service while switch maintenance is performed. Bus service will replace train service for approximately 30 hours.

tool_args.label: West Hempstead & Far Rockaway Branches – Track & Power Maintenance

payload.project_name: West Hempstead & Far Rockaway Branches – Track & Power Maintenance
payload.description: On the week of April 6th through April 10th, LIRR Engineering forces will perform track and power maintenance during the midday period along the West Hempstead Branch and near Far Rockaway Station. Bus service will replace train service between Valley Stream and West Hempstead.

tool_args.label: Port Washington Branch – Bridge Maintenance (Alley Creek)

payload.description: On the weekends of March 28-29 and April 11-12, one of two main tracks will be taken out of service between Bayside and Great Neck while the Alley Creek bridge is rehabilitated. Schedule adjustments for approximately 48 hours.

tool_args.label: Main Line – Crossing Renewal (Wicks Road)

payload.description: On the weekends of March 28-29 and April 11-12, one of two main tracks will be taken out of service between Wyandanch and Central Islip while the Wicks Road crossing in Brentwood is reconstructed. Schedules on the Ronkonkoma/Greenport branch will be adjusted for approximately 48 hours.

tool_args.label: Main Line – Signal Testing (Queens Interlocking)

payload.description: On the weekends of April 18-19 and April 25-26, three of four main tracks will be out of service in Queens Interlocking while signal testing is performed in advance of a signal cutover later this year. Bus service will replace train service between Stewart Manor and Hempstead. Eastbound trains will bypass stops at Hollis, Queens Village, and Elmont-UBS Arena. NYCT and NICE buses will accommodate customers. No service at Bellerose Station or Country Life Press Station. Ronkonkoma service reduced to hourly.

Long Island Committee informed of trackwork programs
Projects will maintain state of good repair

payload.claim_text: These projects will allow us to maintain a state of good repair.
payload.subject: trackwork programs

tool_args.label: Signal testing will improve configuration, capacity, and OTP

payload.claim_text: Once complete, the improved switch configuration and modernized signal system will provide enhanced routing options, additional capacity and improve OTP through this vital segment of the Main Line corridor.
payload.subject: Main Line Signal Testing in Queens Interlocking
